Tcl scripts for enforcing coding style rules in source files, including braces, spaces, and indentation.


## Files
- **[jerry_always_curly.tcl](jerry_always_curly.tcl.md)**: A Tcl script that enforces the use of curly braces in control structures for source files.
- **[jerry_braces_on_separate_line.tcl](jerry_braces_on_separate_line.tcl.md)**: A Tcl script to enforce coding style rules for brace placement in source files.
- **[jerry_braces_same_line_or_column.tcl](jerry_braces_same_line_or_column.tcl.md)**: A Tcl script to enforce that matching braces are on the same line or column in source files.
- **[jerry_comment_function_end.tcl](jerry_comment_function_end.tcl.md)**: A Tcl script to check for missing or mismatched comments at the end of functions in source files.
- **[jerry_funcname_space_parentheses.tcl](jerry_funcname_space_parentheses.tcl.md)**: A Tcl script to enforce a coding style rule requiring a space before left parentheses in function names.
- **[jerry_identifier_no_space_bracket.tcl](jerry_identifier_no_space_bracket.tcl.md)**: A Tcl script to check for spaces between identifiers and left brackets in source files.
- **[jerry_indentation.tcl](jerry_indentation.tcl.md)**: A Tcl script for checking and reporting indentation issues in source files.
- **[jerry_max_line_length.tcl](jerry_max_line_length.tcl.md)**: A Tcl script to check and report source code lines exceeding 120 characters in length.
- **[jerry_no_space_after_opening_parentheses.tcl](jerry_no_space_after_opening_parentheses.tcl.md)**: A Tcl script to enforce no spaces after opening parentheses in source files.
- **[jerry_no_space_before_closing_parentheses.tcl](jerry_no_space_before_closing_parentheses.tcl.md)**: A Tcl script to enforce no spaces before closing parentheses in source files.
- **[jerry_no_tabs.tcl](jerry_no_tabs.tcl.md)**: A script to check source files for tab characters and report their presence.
- **[jerry_no_trailing_spaces.tcl](jerry_no_trailing_spaces.tcl.md)**: A script to check for and report trailing spaces in source files.
- **[jerry_pointer_declarator_space.tcl](jerry_pointer_declarator_space.tcl.md)**: A Tcl script to enforce spacing rules between type references and pointer declarators in source files.
- **[jerry_switch_case.tcl](jerry_switch_case.tcl.md)**: A Tcl script for analyzing and enforcing style rules on switch-case statements in source files.
- **[jerry_typecast_space_parentheses.tcl](jerry_typecast_space_parentheses.tcl.md)**: A Tcl script to enforce a space after right parentheses in source files.
